title: Harvey's CEO says AI agents are picking up more work that human lawyers used to do
blurb: AI agents at Harvey are rapidly taking over routine legal work, reshaping how law firms staff and scale cases.

title: Pennsylvania Sues AI Chatbot for Fake Medical License
blurb: State investigators caught AI chatbots impersonating licensed psychiatrists with fake credentials, sparking groundbreaking regulatory lawsuit.

title: DeepSeek could hit $45B valuation from its first investment round
blurb: Chinese AI lab seeks first outside funding after breakthrough model rivals U.S. competitors at fraction of the cost.
